svg.aria-label: Kandji macOS master guide cover showing setup, security hardening, and compliance operations for managed Mac fleets
svg.title: Kandji macOS master guide: setup, security, and compliance

g.text: Profiles, scripts, patch rules, and fleet automation in one lane
Declarative management : remediation loops : patch enforcement
Audit trails, escrow, and policy drift control for security teams
Device posture, evidence exports, and exception handling
One console for rollout, security, governance, and audit readiness
